summary: ISS-738 is stale. The curmudgeon review (SEC-4.5.9.json, Cycle 1, 2026-04-07T06:15Z) correctly identified that our section claimed d_geo was undefined. However, EXP-003 (integrated 2026-04-07T08:53Z) completely rewrote the section to fix this and all other major issues. The current Section 2.9 text: (1) explicitly presents the V13 Finsler formula with all parameters, (2) acknowledges the formula as a genuine attempt at a forward model, (3) correctly critiques the parameters as globe-derived, (4) addresses MDS circularity in a dedicated paragraph, (5) fixes the Christchurch-Greymouth comparison to use great-circle distance, (6) fixes the version-history argument to acknowledge normal scientific iteration. All content issues from the curmudgeon review are resolved. Only remaining gap: DOCX/PDF format lacks Section 2.9 content (infrastructure issue, recommend separate ISS if desired).
